name: operator extensions file overrides plugin defaults via the cascade per the source folder operator contract
command:
mkdir -p generated-code-quality-standards/google generated-code-quality-standards/_operator/google && printf 'source:
  id: google-tsguide
rules:
  - id: g-ts-001
    severity: P2
' > generated-code-quality-standards/google/tsguide.yaml && printf 'source:
  id: google-tsguide
rules:
  - id: g-ts-001
    severity: P0
' > generated-code-quality-standards/_operator/google/tsguide-extensions.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runner.sh" --aggregate-only --root generated-code-quality-standards --rule g-ts-001 2>out.txt && grep -q 'severity=P0' out.txt && grep -q 'source=_operator/google' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
